title: cyperus tenuiculmis
intro: Cyperus tenuiculmis, also known as slender umbrella sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cyperus tenuiculmis include its potential to aid in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues, as well as its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. Cyperus tenuiculmis can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine.
